title: euphorbia pilulifera var. hirta
intro: Euphorbia pilulifera var. hirta, also known as the Japanese spurge, is a perennial herb native to Japan and Korea. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Euphorbia pilulifera var. hirta include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and protect against cell damage. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, the roots are used to make a decoction, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
